name: qauto-multi-env-tests
description: Cypress E2E tests for qauto and qauto2: register, login, add car, add fuel expense

scripts.cy:run:all: npm run cy:run:qauto && npm run cy:run:qauto2
scripts.report:generate: cd cypress/reports && marge index.json -o html -f index --reportPageTitle "QAuto multi-env report"
scripts.report: npm run report:merge && npm run report:generate
